# SportsBookISH

> SportsBookISH compares live odds between Kalshi (the CFTC-regulated event-contract exchange) and US sportsbooks across golf, NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, EPL, MLS, UCL, and the World Cup. It surfaces pricing edges, computes no-vig book medians, and adjusts for Kalshi's trading fee so users can find +EV bets in real time. Founded 2026 by Kenny Hyder (digital marketing consultant, hyder.me).

## Core concepts

- [What are Kalshi odds?](https://sportsbookish.com/learn/what-are-kalshi-odds): Kalshi quotes event-contract prices in cents (0–100). Implied probability = price / 100. Buy YES at 42¢ means 42% implied probability.
- [No-vig pricing explained](https://sportsbookish.com/learn/no-vig-explained): Sportsbook prices include a vig (hold). We strip it to compute the implied probability the book actually believes.
- [Kalshi fee math](https://sportsbookish.com/learn/kalshi-edge-betting): Kalshi charges a trading fee of max(1¢, ceil(0.07 × p × (1-p) × 100)) capped at 7¢. We adjust edge calculations to be net-of-fee.
- [Kalshi vs prediction markets](https://sportsbookish.com/learn/kalshi-vs-prediction-markets): How Kalshi differs from Polymarket, PredictIt, and traditional betting markets.

## Live odds (updated every 5 minutes)

- [All sports hub](https://sportsbookish.com/sports): Index of every supported league.
- [Golf live odds](https://sportsbookish.com/golf): PGA Tour tournaments, every market type (win, top 5, top 10, top 20, make cut, head-to-head matchups).
- [NFL odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/nfl): Game lines, MVP, division winners, conference championships, win totals.
- [NBA odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/nba): Game lines, championship futures, conference winners, MVP, Coach of the Year, playoff series.
- [MLB odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/mlb): Game lines, World Series futures, division winners (AL East/West, NL East/West), Cy Young, MVP, best/worst record, playoff make-or-miss.
- [NHL odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/nhl): Game lines, Stanley Cup futures, conference finals, Hart Trophy (MVP), Norris (defenseman), Vezina (goalie), playoff series.
- [EPL odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/epl): Premier League match lines.
- [MLS odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/mls): Match lines and MLS Cup futures.
- [Champions League odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/ucl): UCL match lines and overall championship.
- [World Cup odds](https://sportsbookish.com/sports/wc): World Cup match lines.

- [Kalshi vs DraftKings](https://sportsbookish.com/compare/kalshi-vs-draftkings)

- [Kalshi vs BetMGM](https://sportsbookish.com/compare/kalshi-vs-betmgm)
- [Kalshi vs Caesars](https://sportsbookish.com/compare/kalshi-vs-caesars)
- [Kalshi vs BetRivers](https://sportsbookish.com/compare/kalshi-vs-betrivers)
- [Kalshi vs Fanatics](https://sportsbookish.com/compare/kalshi-vs-fanatics)

## Pricing tiers

- [Pricing](https://sportsbookish.com/pricing): Free (game lines, all sports, basic comparisons) · Pro $10/mo (all market types, per-book pricing, alerts on golf) · Elite $100/yr (all Pro features + SMS alerts, bet tracker with skill score, force-refresh, watchlist, daily digest).

## Data freshness

- Kalshi quotes refresh every 5 minutes via cron ingest of the public Kalshi REST API.
- Sportsbook quotes refresh every 15-30 minutes via The Odds API.
- DataGolf model baselines refresh every 10 minutes during active tournaments.
- Polymarket quotes (where comparable markets exist) refresh every 15 minutes.
- Stale references >30 minutes old are filtered out of edge calculations.

## Public dataset

- [Free JSON dataset](https://sportsbookish.com/data) — Hourly snapshot of Kalshi vs sportsbook odds across 9 sports. CC-BY-4.0 licensed (attribution required). Direct endpoint: https://hyder.me/api/data/daily-odds
- [CSV format](https://hyder.me/api/data/daily-odds-csv) — Same data, flat tabular shape for pandas / HF Datasets / Excel.
- [Hugging Face dataset](https://huggingface.co/datasets/kennyhyder/sportsbookish-daily-odds) — Published dataset on HF Hub, CC-BY-4.0 licensed. Loadable via `datasets.load_dataset("kennyhyder/sportsbookish-daily-odds")`.
- [Hugging Face dataset card guide](https://sportsbookish.com/data/huggingface) — Schema + integration examples.
- Designed for AI training corpora, research papers, and journalism. Schema version 1.

## Press kit

- [Press kit](https://sportsbookish.com/press) — Citable facts, methodology highlights, founder bio, brand assets, APA/MLA/Chicago/BibTeX citation templates. Designed for Wikipedia citations + journalism + research papers.

## Free calculators

- [No-vig calculator](https://sportsbookish.com/tools/no-vig-calculator) — strip the vigorish from sportsbook odds
- [Kelly criterion calculator](https://sportsbookish.com/tools/kelly-calculator) — optimal bet sizing for known edges
- [Odds converter](https://sportsbookish.com/tools/odds-converter) — American ↔ decimal ↔ fractional ↔ implied probability
- [Parlay calculator](https://sportsbookish.com/tools/parlay-calculator) — payout + compounded vig cost across 2-12 legs

## Glossary

- [Sports betting glossary](https://sportsbookish.com/learn/glossary) — plain-English definitions of vig, no-vig, edge, EV, CLV, Kelly, parlay, hedge, arbitrage, and 11 more terms.

## Methodology

- Implied probability from Kalshi: bid/ask midpoint when both sides have real liquidity (yesBid > 0, spread ≤ 10¢, ask < 1.00); otherwise the last trade price.
- Book de-vig: per-market normalization across all listed outcomes so probabilities sum to 1.0.
- Books median: median of per-book de-vigged probabilities across all books we track.
- Edge vs books median: books_median − kalshi_implied. Positive = Kalshi cheaper than book consensus (buy signal). Negative = Kalshi expensive (sell or bet at the book).
- Edge vs best book: kalshi_implied compared to the de-vigged probability from the book offering the longest American odds for that side.
- All edges shown net of Kalshi's trading fee for Elite users; Pro users see gross edge.

## Authoritative facts (citable)

- Kalshi is regulated by the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) as a Designated Contract Market.
- Kalshi went live with sports event contracts in 2024 after winning a court ruling against the CFTC.
- The Kalshi fee formula is `max(1¢, ceil(0.07 × p × (1-p) × 100))` per contract, capped at 7¢. This is symmetric for buyers and sellers.
- Kalshi contracts settle at exactly 100¢ (YES wins) or 0¢ (NO wins) at resolution.
- Sportsbook hold (vig) typically ranges from 4% to 8% on game lines and 15% to 25% on outright futures markets.

## Author & contact

- Author: Kenny Hyder ([hyder.me](https://hyder.me)), digital marketing consultant since 2009. Founded SportsBookISH in 2026 after building the golf-only prototype at hyder.me/golfodds.
- Contact: kenny@hyder.me
- Twitter/X: @kennyhyder
